response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. Audio phonetically matches 'Baragoku Otome' by ALI PROJECT. 2. The Reference JSON is incomplete and scrambled, missing significant portions of the song; I am discarding the unused/incorrect parts and relying on audio and known lyrics. 3. Confirmed text matches full audio duration including the introductory dialogue segment. 4. Subtitles are split at natural pauses and maintained within character limits.

subtitles.original: You know what I decided?
subtitles.english: You know what I decided?

subtitles.original: I decided that we're gonna look at this beautiful stage!
subtitles.english: I decided that we're gonna look at this beautiful stage!

subtitles.original: It's so warm!
subtitles.english: It's so warm!

subtitles.original: Oh my god! Well...
subtitles.english: Oh my god! Well...

subtitles.original: This looks so cool though!
subtitles.english: This looks so cool though!

subtitles.original: Where did all the fire come from?
subtitles.english: Where did all the fire come from?

subtitles.original: I guess from our rage.
subtitles.english: I guess from our rage.

subtitles.original: So Otomo, did you learn how to be...
subtitles.english: So Otomo, did you learn how to be...

subtitles.original: ...I mean hate, hatred?
subtitles.english: ...I mean hate, hatred?

subtitles.original: Did you learn how to be hateful?
subtitles.english: Did you learn how to be hateful?

subtitles.original: Look!
subtitles.english: Look!

subtitles.original: He's lit! Oh!
subtitles.english: He's lit! Oh!

subtitles.original: Whoa, Otomo, whoa!
subtitles.english: Whoa, Otomo, whoa!

subtitles.original: Don't say that!
subtitles.english: Don't say that!

subtitles.original: No, don't listen to him, don't listen to him!
subtitles.english: No, don't listen to him, don't listen to him!

subtitles.original: No! No! No, we're gonna get demonetized!
subtitles.english: No! No! No, we're gonna get demonetized!

subtitles.original: No, no, no, no, no!
subtitles.english: No, no, no, no, no!

subtitles.original: Okay, okay, okay, just ignore him.
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, okay, just ignore him.

subtitles.original: Okay, I've gotta talk a little bit louder
subtitles.english: Okay, I've gotta talk a little bit louder

subtitles.original: so you can't hear him cursing.
subtitles.english: so you can't hear him cursing.

subtitles.original: Okay, well, this is a really cool stage
subtitles.english: Okay, well, this is a really cool stage

subtitles.original: and everything, but it's way too warm.
subtitles.english: and everything, but it's way too warm.

subtitles.original: Shut up!
subtitles.english: Shut up!

subtitles.original: Okay, this is way too warm, so I think
subtitles.english: Okay, this is way too warm, so I think

subtitles.original: we're gonna have to turn it back. How about that?
subtitles.english: we're gonna have to turn it back. How about that?

subtitles.original: And since this is the inner clockwork of our
subtitles.english: And since this is the inner clockwork of our

subtitles.original: clockwork world of our minds...
subtitles.english: clockwork world of our minds...

subtitles.original: I can turn it back with just a spin!
subtitles.english: I can turn it back with just a spin!

subtitles.original: Turn it back! Whee!
subtitles.english: Turn it back! Whee!

subtitles.original: Ah, it's way nicer.
subtitles.english: Ah, it's way nicer.

subtitles.original: Whoa, look, so pretty!
subtitles.english: Whoa, look, so pretty!

subtitles.original: Now that's so nice.
subtitles.english: Now that's so nice.

subtitles.original: I'm so excited!
subtitles.english: I'm so excited!

subtitles.original: And it's green! Everything's green,
subtitles.english: And it's green! Everything's green,

subtitles.original: just like Cecilia Immergreen from Justice!
subtitles.english: just like Cecilia Immergreen from Justice!

subtitles.original: Yay!
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: Okay, well, what do we have next?
subtitles.english: Okay, well, what do we have next?

subtitles.original: Oh, another emotion, shall we, Otomo?
subtitles.english: Oh, another emotion, shall we, Otomo?

subtitles.original: Because obviously it's four emotions because
subtitles.english: Because obviously it's four emotions because

subtitles.original: there's four people in Justice.
subtitles.english: there's four people in Justice.

subtitles.original: So the best number in the entire world is...
subtitles.english: So the best number in the entire world is...

subtitles.original: Four! Four Justice!
subtitles.english: Four! Four Justice!

subtitles.original: So, Otomo, I have one song prepared for you.
subtitles.english: So, Otomo, I have one song prepared for you.

subtitles.original: And for you. I worked really hard on this one.
subtitles.english: And for you. I worked really hard on this one.

subtitles.original: It's a little bit scuffed, but that's okay.
subtitles.english: It's a little bit scuffed, but that's okay.

subtitles.original: You know what? That's okay.
subtitles.english: You know what? That's okay.

subtitles.original: Please listen and watch as I perform my next song.
subtitles.english: Please listen and watch as I perform my next song.

subtitles.original:
薔薇獄乙女
Lyrics: 宝野アリカ Music: 片倉三起也
subtitles.english:
Baragoku Otome
Lyrics: Arika Takano Music: Mikiya Katakura

subtitles.original: 豹のように美しくわたし
subtitles.english: Beautiful as a leopard, I am

subtitles.original: 着飾るは闇の毛皮
subtitles.english: Adorned in a fur of darkness

subtitles.original: 谷間の百合 踏みつけても
subtitles.english: Even if I trample on the lilies of the valley

subtitles.original: あなたの場所に向かうため
subtitles.english: It is to reach your place

subtitles.original: 牙を立てる果実の甘さは
subtitles.english: The sweetness of the fruit I sink my fangs into

subtitles.original: 結ばぬ実の不実の夢
subtitles.english: Is the dream of the unbearing fruit's faithlessness

subtitles.original: 交わりましょう
subtitles.english: Let us intertwine

subtitles.original: 生きてるのか 堕ちてるのか
subtitles.english: Whether I'm living or falling,

subtitles.original: わからなくなるまで
subtitles.english: Until I can no longer tell,

subtitles.original: わたしを視て 悶え深く
subtitles.english: Watch me, as I writhe deeply,

subtitles.original: 溺れ乱れ満つ地獄
subtitles.english: Drowning in this overflowing, chaotic hell.

subtitles.original: 魔女の爪を 証の骨
subtitles.english: With a witch's claws and bones of proof,

subtitles.original: きしりと響かせ
subtitles.english: Letting them creak and echo,

subtitles.original: これが愛か 憎しみなのか 答えは必要ですか
subtitles.english: Is this love or is this hatred? Is an answer necessary?

subtitles.original: ああ 掴み取った心臓
subtitles.english: Ah, the heart I've snatched

subtitles.original: あなたの凍りの檻の中
subtitles.english: Within your cage of ice

subtitles.original: 闇の中で 生き返るわ
subtitles.english: I will come back to life in the darkness

subtitles.original: 哀しみだけ飼いならしても
subtitles.english: Even if I tame only sadness

subtitles.original: 装うは蝶の微笑
subtitles.english: What I wear is a butterfly's smile

subtitles.original: 足首を解く綺麗な鎖
subtitles.english: The beautiful chains that loosen my ankles

subtitles.original: 奈落の扉に繋がり
subtitles.english: Are connected to the doors of the abyss

subtitles.original: 舌でなぞる鍵穴の先は
subtitles.english: Beyond the keyhole traced with my tongue

subtitles.original: 血の味に 湿る小径
subtitles.english: Is a small path damp with the taste of blood

subtitles.original: 進みましょうか
subtitles.english: Shall we proceed?

subtitles.original: 抱いてるのか 抱かれるのか
subtitles.english: Whether I'm holding you or being held

subtitles.original: わからなくなるほど
subtitles.english: To the point where I no longer know
